canonical_definition: The Functional Map of the World (FMOW) dataset, a satellite imagery benchmark for object classification that includes multiple classes and spurious groups, used to test model performance in complex settings.
papers: Mitigating Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot Multimodal Models
TEOChat: A Large Vision-Language Assistant for Temporal Earth Observation Data

definitions.text: The Functional Map of the World (FMOW) dataset, a satellite imagery benchmark for object classification that includes multiple classes and spurious groups, used to test model performance in complex settings.
definitions.paper: Mitigating Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot Multimodal Models

definitions.text: Functional Map of the World is an earth-observation dataset of satellite image time series used here for temporal scene classification.
definitions.paper: TEOChat: A Large Vision-Language Assistant for Temporal Earth Observation Data

relationships.paper: Understanding prompt engineering may not require rethinking generalization
